2143080.name: Entropy : Zero 2 Soundtrack
2143080.description:
The official soundtrack to Entropy : Zero 2 - with some unused extras!

Includes original Half-Life tracks remixed by John Richardson (Breadman), Caleb West (CW3D) and Allen Jones (Blixibon) and original tracks composed by Spencer Baggett.

Track List:

  • More Choices - (Breadman)
  • 'm Innocent - (CW3D)
  • You're the Sick One - (CW3D)
  • Riding Memories - (CW3D)
  • Wake Up - (Breadman)
  • Illusion of Choice - (Breadman)
  • The Ruins of Nova Proskept - (Spencer Baggett)
  • Not Your Average Cop - (Spencer Baggett)
  • Arctic Wistful - (Breadman)
  • Dark Stalker - (Spencer Baggett)
  • Cold Calculated - (Spencer Baggett)
  • An Unsightly Scene Part 1 - (Spencer Baggett; CW3D)

  • Crab Temporal - (Breadman)

  • Echoes of the Turrets - (CW3D)
  • Big Guy - (CW3D)
  • This Was Home - (CW3D)
  • Confrontation - (Spencer Baggett)
  • Unexpressed Axis - (Breadman)
  • Venture Ghost - (Breadman)
  • Driven - (Spencer Baggett)
  • Depot Drones - (Breadman)

  • Escalation Part 3 - (Spencer Baggett)
  • People Don't Change - (Breadman; CW3D)

  • Problem Soul - (Breadman)
